positive: A vibrant, stylized geometric pattern featuring abstract woodland elements, such as stylized deer antlers, interconnected crescent moons, and blooming stylized wildflowers, rendered in a clean, continuous line-art motif. The pattern should be composed in a high-contrast, repeating tile format suitable for seamless apparel printing. The color palette must be limited to deep forest green, burnt ochre, slate blue, and off-white cream. Composition should be balanced and highly detailed, emphasizing negative space and strong silhouettes. Studio lighting, vector art aesthetic, ultra high resolution, trending on ArtStation.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, grainy, low detail, deformed, extra limbs, noise, poor composition, bad anatomy
